title: Forward Deployed Strategist / Engineer (AI)
company_focus: Agentic AI for higher education operations
description:
Who We Are:

We deploy powerful AI agents in complex, regulated
industries, specializing in building the systems that enable
autonomous agents to operate entire functions securely and
reliably. Our belief is that people should be free of
administrative and operational drudgery so they can create
value through creativity, reasoning, and judgement.

We’re starting in higher education, a sector with ~$700B in
expenses defined by heavy workflows across departments, such
as admissions, financial aid, facilities, advising, student
services, advancement, and more. Our agents are already
embedded across these departments, interacting with millions
of students and staff. They process applications, package
aid, resolve verification issues, run large-scale
communication workflows, handle student support tickets, and
more.

We believe that universities are among the most
consequential institutions in the world, sitting at the
foundation of social and economic progress. Improving how
they operate improves who gets educated, who gets supported,
and who gets a chance. When higher education runs better,
everything built on top of it does too.

About The Role:

As a Forward Deployed Strategist at CollegeVine, you’ll
partner directly with our university customers to solve
their biggest challenges using data, AI, and web
technologies. You’ll work in small, cross-functional teams,
owning end-to-end delivery of high-stakes projects: from
requirements gathering and architecture to code, deployment,
and ongoing support.

This role is ideal for someone who aspires to be both a
technical leader and a strategic partner-think startup CTO
meets solutions architect - with the opportunity to
influence product direction and drive real outcomes for
education institutions.

Responsibilities:

- Customer Engagement & Discovery
  - Rapidly understand complex customer workflows and pain
    points.
  - Translate domain needs into valuable technical solutions.
- End-to-End Delivery
  - Own design, development, testing, and deployment of custom
    features and integrations.
  - Collaborate with product managers, designers, engineers,
    data scientists, and customer success to iterate
    quickly.
- Data-Driven Problem Solving
  - Leverage large‐scale datasets, LLMs, and AI agents to
    surface insights and automate workflows.
  - Build dashboards, APIs, or custom agents that drive
    measurable impact.
- Travel & On-Site Collaboration
  - Occasional travel to client sites for discovery, workshops,
    training, and deployments.

What We’re Looking For:

- Experience & Expertise
  - 3+ years of product management, startup strategy &
    operations, consulting, investment banking, or software
    engineering experience, ideally including roles that
    involved solution delivery and customer-facing projects.
  - Proven ability to own complex projects end-to-end in a fast-
    moving environment.
- Problem-Solving Mindset
  - Deeply analytical, with a knack for breaking down ambiguous
    challenges into concrete solutions.
  - Eagerness to learn new tools, frameworks, and research -
    especially in ML/AI.
- Collaboration & Communication
  - Excellent interpersonal skills: able to bridge technical and
    non-technical audiences.
  - Humble, pragmatic, and coachable - valuing feedback and
    always seeking to raise the bar.
  - Making your work visible: share what you learn from
    customers with the broader org and make sure nobody is
    ever surprised by project status.
- Entrepreneurial Drive
  - Aspires to grow into an engineering leader or product-
    centric role.
  - Comfortable stepping into uncharted territory and defining
    what “done” looks like.

CollegeVine partners with 200+ universities, deploying
agentic AI to power campus operations. We have raised
venture funding from dedicated investors such as Menlo
Ventures (Anthropic, Carta), Silversmith Capital Partners
(Webflow, Formstack), Morningside Technology Ventures
(Xiaomi, TikTok), and more. In 2020, after years of being a
remote-friendly company, CollegeVine became a fully remote
company (with a NYC office) with a diverse cast of team
members based predominantly in the United States, but also
around the world.

building and deploying AI agents to solve real customer
problems. The role specifically mentions leveraging LLMs and
AI agents to automate workflows and building custom agents
that drive measurable impact.
